popularStory.headline: Rodrigo Diaz " El Cid" de Vivar  (d 1099) Bio Sketch
popularStory.description:
BIO:   The Cid; buried in the Cloister of San Pedro de Cardena, at Burgos, Spain.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/CastilNob.htm#ElviraRodriquezMRamiroNavarre, as of 11/6/2014

zh.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”是Count Diego Lainez , Senhor de Vivar和Desconhecida的兒子，於1043年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯昆塔尼利亞 維瓦爾。他於1074年7月19日與Jimena Díaz de Oviedo在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1057年登記服兵役。他去世於1099年7月10日在西班牙可蒙尼達 瓦倫希亞納瓦倫西亞瓦利納希亞享年56歲，埋葬在西班牙利安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”是Count Diego Lainez , Senhor de Vivar和Desconhecida的儿子，于1043年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯昆塔尼利亞 維瓦爾。他于1074年7月19日与Jimena Díaz de Oviedo在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1057年登记服兵役。他去世于1099年7月10日在西班牙可蒙尼達 瓦倫希亞納瓦倫西亞瓦利納希亞享年56岁，埋葬在西班牙利安。

nameMeanings.name: Díaz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Rafael, Miguel, Pedro, Roberto.
Spanish (Díaz): patronymic from the medieval personal name Didacus (see Diego ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Diazdeleon
meanings: Spanish: combination of the surname Díaz (see Diaz ) and the name León (see Leon ) with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Diego
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Francisco, Juan, Fernando, Jose, Miguel, Mario, Maximo, Salvador, Aida, Ana, Domingo.

Spanish: from the very common male personal name Diego, which in the Spanish-speaking world is usually taken to be a shortened form of Santiago . However, this may be only a folk etymology. The personal name is found in the Middle Ages in the Latin forms Didacus and Didagus, probably a derivative of Greek didachē ‘doctrine, teaching’. However, in view of the fact that this personal name is unknown outside the Iberian Peninsula, it may actually have a pre-Roman origin.

variants.name: Diez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Juan, Fernando, Pedro, Rafael, Roberto, Angel, Eduardo, Mario, Ricardo.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vivar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Jorge, Jose, Manuel, Miguel, Pedro, Alejandro, Arturo, Felipe, Francisco, Jose Antonio, Julio.

Spanish: habitational name from any of the places called with Vivar, especially from Vivar del Cid, in Burgos province, the place where the medieval warrior Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar, also known as El Cid, was born.

nameMeanings.name: Rodrigo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. It was the name of the last king of the Visigoths, defeated by the Moors in 711 .

en.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid” was born in 1043, in Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain as the son of Count Diego Lainez , Senhor de Vivar and Desconhecida. He married Jimena Díaz de Oviedo on 19 July 1074, in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1057. He died on 10 July 1099, in Valencia, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spain, at the age of 56, and was buried in León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid” est né en 1043, à Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne, fils de Count Diego Lainez , Senhor de Vivar et Desconhecida. Il a épousé Jimena Díaz de Oviedo le 19 juillet 1074, à Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1057. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1099, à València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Espagne, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid” wurde 1043 in Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien, als Sohn von Count Diego Lainez , Senhor de Vivar und Desconhecida geboren. Er hat am 19. Juli 1074 in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien Jimena Díaz de Oviedo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1057 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 10. Juli 1099 im Alter von 56 Jahren in València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spanien und wurde in León, Spanien begraben.

Lui sposato Jimena Díaz de Oviedo il 19 luglio 1074, nel Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1057. Morì il 10 luglio 1099, nel València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spagna, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a León, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”は1043年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスクインタニラ ヴィバーでCount Diego Lainez , Senhor de VivarとDesconhecidaの息子として生まれた。1074年7月19日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスでJimena Díaz de Oviedoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1057年に兵役登録をした。彼は1099年7月10日にスペインコムニダド ベレンシアナベレンシアヴァルeンシアで56歳で死去し，スペインレoンにて埋葬された。

ko.Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y Le: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스 퀸탠이라 비바르

ko.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid”(은)는 1043년 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스 퀸탠이라 비바르에서 Count Diego Lainez , Senhor de Vivar(와)과 Desconhecida의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1074년 7월 19일 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스에서 Jimena Díaz de Oviedo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1057년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1099년 7월 10일 스페인 코먼이다드 발샤나 발샤 발e샤에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 레o에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid” nasceu em 1043, em Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha filho de Count Diego Lainez , Senhor de Vivar e Desconhecida. Ele casou-se com Jimena Díaz de Oviedo em 19 de julho de 1074, em Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1057. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1099, em València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Espanha, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em León, Espanha.

ru.Vivar del Cid, Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos: вивар дель сид, куинтанилла вивар, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid” родился в 1043 г. в местности куинтанилла вивар, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания. Его родителей звали Count Diego Lainez , Senhor de Vivar и Desconhecida. Он женился на женщине по имени Jimena Díaz de Oviedo 19 июля 1074 г. в местности бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1057 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 10 июля 1099 г. в местности валeнся, веиленся, комунидад веиленсяна, Испания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Díaz de Vivar “El Cid” nació en 1043, en Quintanilla Vivar, Burgos, Castilla y León, España como hijo de Count Diego Lainez , Senhor de Vivar y Desconhecida. Se casó con Jimena Díaz de Oviedo el 19 de julio de 1074, en Burgos, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1057. Murió el 10 de julio de 1099, en Valencia, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, España, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en León, España.
